summary:
SPIRITUAL NOURISHMENT AND ANOINTING: Brandon discusses the profound impact of the Holy Spirit, comparing it to an unparalleled experience that surpasses any worldly escape or drug addiction. Brandon recounts attending a recent Billy Burke meeting where physical healings and strong manifestations of divine presence occurred. He emphasizes the necessity for believers to continuously replenish their spiritual state by attending such gatherings, warning that typical weekly sermons are insufficient. Diana contributes to the discussion by comparing this spiritual nourishment to a physical spa, noting that investing time in the spirit is essential for fighting spiritual battles from a place of overflow rather than emptiness.

PROPHETIC VISIONS OF END-TIME PORTALS: Brandon shares a vision in which the hand of God extends from the heavens, emitting ten shafts of light from the fingers, which he identifies as end-time portals for global glory and outpouring. He notes that these major portals are located in specific areas, including central Oklahoma, Texas, and the Millennial Church, before splintering and spreading to the ends of the Earth. Brandon explains that this phenomenon marks the beginning of a major global harvest of souls. He highlights the intense desperation and hunger among people worldwide, mentioning individuals traveling thousands of miles from Mexico City and Canada to experience an authentic spiritual movement.

SUSTAINING DELIVERANCE THROUGH SCRIPTURE: Brandon articulates the crucial balance between the initial anointing and the sustained knowledge of the Word of God. He explains that while the anointing breaks the yoke of bondage and delivers individuals, the enemy will inevitably return to test this newfound freedom. To maintain deliverance and resist the devil, Brandon advises believers to deeply embed scripture within their hearts and speak it aloud as a defensive sword. He references teachings from Kenneth E. Hagin, emphasizing that the Word of God remains eternally active and yields continuous revelation as a person matures spiritually.

EXPECTATIONS FOR 2025 AND PHYSICAL RENEWAL: Brandon declares 2025 as a year of significant turnaround, breakthrough, and financial overflow for believers, asserting that past investments will yield a massive harvest. He contrasts the life-giving nature of divine glory with the destructive nature of demonic forces, stating that proximity to the devil drains physical vitality, referencing witches and Joe Biden as examples of spiritual decay. In contrast, Brandon points to Moses to illustrate how remaining in divine glory preserves youthfulness, bodily health, and skin quality without artificial enhancements.

HEALING DECREES AND PRAYERS FOR LEADERS: Brandon and Diana issue specific commands for bodily healing, addressing hormonal imbalances, reproductive system functions, bone alignment, thyroid health, and gallbladder operations. They decree that every bodily cell must align with its original design. Additionally, Brandon focuses on the baptism of the Holy Spirit and speaking in tongues as foundational steps for victory. The discussion concludes with specific prophetic declarations directed at prominent public figures, specifically calling for Elon Musk to utilize Starlink for divine purposes in 2025 and for Donald Trump to experience a profound spiritual salvation, marriage restoration, and supernatural protection over his children.
rawData: [December 10, 2024]-[Where another hotspot for revival will be - a call to prayer - day 53]-[https://youtu.be/T3Er0gUSNLU]-[Hey, good morning family! Praise the Lord. Day 53, I believe. I'm excited you're all here today. I have some things on my heart; I saw some things in the spirit yesterday that I'm going to get into. I was driving around by ORU again, and every time I drive around by ORU, there is an anointing on ORU or Oral Roberts University. I'm telling you, the grounds of Oral Roberts University—and when I drive by there, I have to go to the Post Office to deliver my stuff sometimes for my eBay. We were going to the Billy Burke meeting last night and we were so excited to go. When we showed up, the presence of the Lord was so strong on that meeting. Diana, I mean, did you feel it? "Yes, it was amazing." The glory of the Lord was there and people were getting healed of all kinds of things. Again, the power of the Lord—there's nothing like it; there's nothing like the presence of the Lord. It is beyond anything the world could ever offer. If you're strung out on drugs, there is no high like the Most High. I'm telling you, I believe a lot of people go to drugs because they're trying to find an escape from their reality, but the only escape that I've ever seen from reality is the Holy Spirit. The more you become addicted to the Holy Spirit in these last days, it's like He is the Most High, isn't it, Diana? "Yes, it's like oxygen." Exactly right. We try so hard to get in meetings like this because this is what feeds you and gets you through. When we pour out like we do on a day-to-day basis—most pastors just preach one sermon a week, maybe two—you've got to fill yourself back up. I even see myself getting dry, but in two days of being in these meetings and then going again tonight, I have an anticipation for the manifestations of the glory, seeing what He did last night again in people's lives and the night before. Sunday night, He gave us a word, prayed for us again, and the power of God was really strong. It's like the Holy Spirit is an electric charge going through you, charging your battery. You can just be sitting in the atmosphere and just drink, couldn't you, Diana? "Yes, it's amazing." I want to be someone who travels around and just goes to all the meetings. I just want to be around the presence of the Lord. I reference the anointing and the call on Billy Burke's life; I believe you honor the man of God and I honor him. Help support his ministry and go to where he's at. If he's in your area, it would behoove you to go to these meetings; the presence of the Lord will change your life. He said that the church we were visiting last night—he got in the spirit and saw the pillars and the portals. He said this place right here is one of the portals of the end times for the glory outpouring. Well, ladies and gentlemen, if you go back to what the Lord showed me about the portals coming out of the Lord's hand—I saw the great God Jehovah's hand come out of the heavens. All ten fingers had shafts of light shoot out, and I said, "Father, what is this?" and He said, "These are end-time portals for the end-time glory and the outpouring." I knew that one of them is in central Oklahoma, one is in Texas, and there's one obviously here. He said the Lord showed him that this church, Millennial Church, has an end-time portal, which I thought was amazing because he saw one of the portals. I said ten major portals went out throughout the world and then they splintered. Now, it's kind of similar to when I told you those four doves were circling and then they exploded and went to all ends of the Earth. We're seeing that, and even Billy was talking about this last outpouring; this major harvest of souls is going to start to happen. We saw a Muslim come to church last night and give his heart to Jesus Christ and he was healed. I saw the power of God knock him down on his back; he was overcoming pain in his hands and the power of the Lord healed him. With that, he accepted Jesus Christ as Lord and Savior. Folks, people are desperate, people are hungry, and they're looking for the authentic. When you taste and see that the Lord is good, there's nothing more that will satisfy that inward soul itch than the Holy Spirit. Do you agree, babe? "Yes." Diana knows; she's walked this journey with me and we know what we're talking about. We know when it's dry and when you go in and experience the presence of the Lord, it will radically change you. There's a reason why you go to service after service and you're listening to a seeker-friendly message and you're not getting changed; it's because there's no Holy Ghost there. The only way that you're going to change is by the anointing that breaks the yoke of bondage. It's the anointing that sets the captives free. But how you stay free, ladies and gentlemen, is by getting the word down inside you. The anointing can only take you so far and then you have to have the word inside of you to keep that devil at bay. Submit yourself therefore unto God, resist the devil, and he will flee from you. But the only way you submit yourself to Him is by getting that word down inside of your heart. You have to know the word and have a revelation. According to Ephesians, that the eyes of your understanding would be enlightened that you may know the hope of your calling and the glorious riches of inheritance. You have a treasure in an earthen vessel that the excellency of the power will be known of Him and not of you. The anointing breaks the yoke, but to keep the yoke off, you have to have the word of God. The enemy comes back immediately to try to test the word. If you don't have a foundation of the word of God inside of you, the anointing will break the yoke, but he automatically comes back to try to kill, steal, and destroy that revelation. The only way that you do that is by the word. The Bible says the word is a sword and it comes out of your mouth to cut the devil. You cut the devil by the word of the Lord out of your mouth, speaking out and decreeing a thing: "I am healed by the stripes of Jesus." Even Billy Burke was talking about getting that word down inside of you to resist it. Faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of God. I can tell you all, literally listening to Brother Hagin all my life and other preachers—listening to them to the point where I go back and I listen to that same sermon from five years ago and get something new out of it because the word is alive. There's no expiration date on the word of God. As your spirit grows, you'll hear something new in that word because you're going from glory to glory. I've told Diana about the pillars and about the glory domes and about the outpouring of the healings coming. The Lord said, "My judgment begins in the house of the Lord first," and we're seeing a cleaning of the house throughout all America right now, exposing darkness and turning on the light. We're going to bring in some new people to fix this room because it takes a lot of cleaning, actually. I believe 2025 is going to be an amazing year. Regardless of what we see on the news, this is your year of turnaround. This is your year for your breakthrough and to receive exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think. This is your time to lay hold of what you've been believing for. The seeds you've sowed in the past are going to come to harvest at last. I believe that this is a year of great overflow for the body of Christ. There was a dear sister in the Lord, one of the pastors from Eufaula, and she got a word about finances. The Lord spoke to them about their church in Eufaula because we visited there. We want to be like traveling word junkies. When you're desperate, people do desperate things. If you are desperate for Jesus, you won't want to stay the same anymore. You've got to get fed up with being broke, busted, and disgusted. I saw people travel from Mexico City to Oklahoma; they drove in a van because they were desperate for a touch. Then you had another man say, "I flew here from Canada." I saw two people from Canada, from British Columbia and Edmonton. Folks, that is desperate, to fly thousands of miles. How hungry are you? If he's in your area, I encourage you to go and visit because you won't leave disappointed. I want to travel to Tampa and Orlando next year. Rodney Howard-Browne has revivals. I see the tangible presence of the Lord moving in their services. Let's go and dip in the river. How thirsty are you for a supernatural touch from the Father? We're so thirsty for an authentic move of God. We're right there on the cusp. He's bringing forth the harvesters, and I believe certain investments are going to skyrocket. We're going to see a major harvest in 2025 to free us up to do the things that God's called us to do. It just takes money, and the Lord provides. When you watch these videos, I hope we encourage you to believe God for the impossible. Diana had some things she wanted to say. "People will spend a lot of money going to a spa or going on vacations for their mental health. It is important, but even more time should be spent on nourishing your spirit, like a spa for your spirit. If you're willing to invest that much time into your physical body, then how much more do we need it for our spirit man?" It's vital because you can't fight a devil weak; you have to fight from the overflow. If you're fighting on empty, you're in trouble. Fixing your spirit fixes everything from the inside out. Moses didn't fade; his eyes didn't grow dim because he stayed in the glory. The glory renews you. That's what I said before about Joe Biden and these people—when you latch on to the devil, he is a 'kill, steal, and destroy' spirit, and it makes your mind reprobate. The closer you are to the devil, the more he tears you down. That's why witches always look really old; the demonic sucks life out of you. But the Bible says that I've come that you might have life and life more abundantly. Connect yourself to the Source, and that is the glory. Moses attached himself to the glory, and their bodies weren't sick. They didn't need hair plugs or Botox; their skin looked good. The anointing is a refresher. When you go to these meetings, it refreshes you. We were sitting in the very back because we got there later back then, and we were like, "Man, Lord, we want to be on the front row," but it doesn't matter because the Holy Spirit is tangible throughout the whole auditorium. We saw a dear sister from San Antonio; she got baptized in the Holy Ghost. She'd been a Baptist her whole life, in her 60s, and she got baptized watching one of our videos. Then I had a young man who got baptized in the Holy Ghost on this channel too. That is the first step to your victory. I don't know how anybody makes it without being baptized in the Holy Spirit, speaking with other tongues. I depend on Him; He is my all in all. I want to encourage you all to get filled. Get the book 'Why Tongues' by Brother Hagin. It's Kenneth E. Hagin. Read that book over and over again. I didn't even get into what I saw in the spirit about Donald Jr., but we'll make another video tomorrow. Let's pray. Father, we thank You for every person here today. We thank You that You're filling them to the overflow right now in the name of Jesus. They are filled with and controlled by the Holy Spirit. I believe for demonstrations of the glory on people's lives today. We reach out for your healing and deliverance. We are joint heirs with Jesus Christ, seated in the heavenlies far above all principalities. Diana, pray for the women. "Yes, Father, I lift up these women that have any hormonal imbalances. I thank You that everything lines up with Your word. Our hormones line up in the name of Jesus. Cycles are regulated, and the reproductive system works as it should. We speak to our bodies. If you're believing for a baby, you say, 'Womb, you line up with the word of God; you will conceive.' Speak to those body parts." I agree. I feel the anointing. "Hormones, you line up with the word of God. Every cell in my body functions as my Creator designed it. Father, if it's your foot, say, 'Foot, line up with the word of God; pain, go now.' Bones straightened, thyroid function, gallbladders, and bile ducts—function like the Lord designed us to, in Jesus' name." I can have everything the Bible says I can have. Amen. "People have been coming up to me telling me they conceived because they prayed with me on video. Lots of babies are coming in 2025." We're humbled to be used. Whoever thought it would be through a YouTube channel? We've come across such nice folks like Robert and Kay. We pray for your financial breakthroughs. We're believing for Elon Musk to become radically born again in 2025 and use Starlink for the glory of God. We call the celebrities filled with the Holy Spirit. We thank You, Lord, that Donald Trump is radically born again and his marriage is restored. We thank You for supernatural covering over his children. Father, we give You glory. There's a turning of the tides. Everybody say amen. Thank you for joining. Please like, subscribe, and click the notification bell. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you, and we love you. We will see you next time. God bless you.]
